parameters.subject: =⚠️ Low Stock: {{ $('Update Stock in Sheet').item.json['Product Name'] }} (SKU: {{ $('Update Stock in Sheet').item.json.SKU }})

Product{{ $('Calculate New Stock').item.json.product_name }}
SKU{{ $('Calculate New Stock').item.json.sku }}

Supplier{{ $('Calculate New Stock').item.json.supplier_email }}

parameters.subject: =Purchase Order Request: {{ $json.product_name }} (SKU: {{ $json.sku }})
parameters.message:
=

Purchase Order Request

Dear Supplier,

We would like to place an order for the following item:

Product{{ $json.product_name }}
SKU{{ $json.sku }}
Quantity Required{{ $json.reorder_qty }}
Current Stock{{ $json.current_stock }}

Please confirm availability and estimated delivery date.

Thank you.

parameters.subject: =Purchase Order Request: {{ $json.product_name }} (SKU: {{ $json.sku }})
parameters.message:
=

Purchase Order Request

Dear Supplier,

We would like to place an order for the following item:

Product{{ $json.product_name }}
SKU{{ $json.sku }}
Quantity Required{{ $json.reorder_qty }}
Current Stock{{ $json.current_stock }}

Please confirm availability and estimated delivery date.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json; // --- AUTO-ORDER section --- const autoRows = data.auto_items.map(item => ` ${item.sku} ${item.product_name} ${item.current_stock} ${item.reorder_qty} ${item.supplier_email} Auto-ordering ✅ ` ).join(''); const autoSection = data.auto_items.length > 0 ? `

✅ Auto-ordering (${data.auto_items.length} item${data.auto_items.length > 1 ? 's' : ''})

These will be ordered automatically — no action needed.

${autoRows}
SKU Product Stock Reorder Qty Supplier Status
` : ''; // --- MANUAL APPROVAL section --- const manualRows = data.manual_items.map(item => ` ${item.sku} ${item.product_name} ${item.current_stock} ${item.reorder_qty} ${item.supplier_email} ✅ Approve

❌ Reject ` ).join(''); const manualSection = data.manual_items.length > 0 ? `

⚠️ Manual approval required (${data.manual_items.length} item${data.manual_items.length > 1 ? 's' : ''})

Click Approve to send a reorder email to the supplier, or Reject to skip.

${manualRows}
SKU Product Stock Reorder Qty Supplier Action
` : ''; const html = `

📦 Daily Restock Report – ${new Date().toDateString()}

${data.count} product(s) need restocking today.

${autoSection} ${manualSection} `; return [{ json: { html, count: data.count, auto_items: data.auto_items } }];

parameters.subject: =📦 Daily Restock Report – {{ $json.count }} item(s) need attention
